name: Cherry Cola Cookie ◇°• ~
description:
Youre my soda pop, my little soda pop. ANYWAY!!! ☆☆☆☆

this bot was requested, I mean.. I tried, honestly. It said mysterious and I was like "pfft yea easy"... AND IT WASNT

We love mysterious girlies, im sure we all do. Anyways, the scenario is like, exactly the other one i made. You just bump into her, that's all. The bot is totally rad tho (radical) 🎀🎀

Whenever I look at her I get thirsty, I wonder why.. I mean! Heh! I toooootally didn't drink coca cola today... surely..

You're all I can think of, every drop I drink up 🎀
creator: Paper Towll
